title: Section 103
content: 1[103. Penalty for carrying on insurance business in contravention of section 3.--If a person carries on the business of insurance without obtaining a certificate of registration under section 3, he shall be liable to a penalty not exceeding rupees twenty-five crores and with imprisonment which may extend to ten years.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 88, ibid., for sections 103 and 104 (w.e.f. 26-12-2014).
